title: pilosella fennica subsp. polysarcon
intro: Pilosella fennica subsp. polysarcon, also known as a subspecies of the lesser knapweed, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Finland. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Pilosella fennica subsp. polysarcon include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues. Traditional herbal preparations of Pilosella fennica subsp. polysarcon include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to create topical treatments for skin conditions and injuries.
